name: Standardized ROI Patch Montage
description: Create a standardized figure panel by extracting patches from the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image. Extract four distinct 64x64 pixel crops of different blobs and arrange them into a 2x2 montage with a scale factor of 1.0 and 0 border width. Save the resulting 128x128 pixel montage as a PNG to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/blobs_montage.png.
